model: claude-sonnet-5 (via output-evaluator Ohana project override, DEC-OHANA-07)

issues.description: Exception handler uses bare Exception with noqa. Intentional per comment, could be more explicit about expected exception types (ValueError from drafter, AttributeError from mock session=None).

summary: C0 phase comprehensive and correct. XML escape prevents injection breakout, tag wrapping declares content as data via explicit directive. Fail-closed redaction pattern ensures PII never reaches LLM unfiltered. Test coverage thorough: endpoint-level bypass-proof + destination log caplog verification. Two-layer defense (structural escape + semantic directive) matches spec §4 RED FLAG requirement.
suggestion: READY FOR CHECKPOINT. All ALLOWED_FILES within scope, no security vulnerabilities, comprehensive test coverage with both unit and endpoint testing. Smoke validates real behavior with path integrity.
